title: What's New in Version {{version}}
description: A highly requested TEN10 feature is here

featured.title: Import Transactions from Excel
featured.description: You can now import transactions from a CSV or Excel file with a guided flow: upload a file, map columns, review rows, and approve only what you want to save.

files.title: CSV and Excel support
files.description: Use the Ten10 template or upload your own spreadsheet with clear column headers.

mapping.title: Smart column mapping
mapping.description: Ten10 suggests mappings automatically, and you can adjust every column before continuing.

review.title: Review before saving
review.description: Nothing is saved until you review, select, and approve the rows for import.
